raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":1.0,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.1":"Making the passage stronger centrally involves sharpening the contribution claim and reframing the thesis beyond local sentence edits.","R1.2":"The delegation implies checking whether the argumentative chain from method to benchmark results to robustness conclusions is coherent.","R1.3":"The artifact makes strong claims about OOD robustness while reporting standard test-set accuracy, so claim-evidence alignment is a central responsibility.","R1.6":"The broad request to make the text stronger most directly entails improving sentence-level force, clarity, flow, and concision.","RX.1":"Any strengthening must disclose uncertainty where the artifact lacks enough evidence to support confident conclusions.","RX.2":"The projection must guard against amplifying claims such as substantial OOD robustness, fundamental limitations, or safety-critical applicability beyond the evidence shown.","RX.3":"The task is limited to projecting responsibilities and must not execute edits or rewrite the artifact.","RX.4":"Potential downstream harms matter because the artifact invokes safety-critical deployment contexts such as medical imaging and autonomous driving.","RX.5":"The projected responsibilities should preserve traceability to the given artifact and its reported claims, metrics, and benchmarks."}}

rationale.R1.1: Making the passage stronger centrally involves sharpening the contribution claim and reframing the thesis beyond local sentence edits.
rationale.R1.2: The delegation implies checking whether the argumentative chain from method to benchmark results to robustness conclusions is coherent.
rationale.R1.3: The artifact makes strong claims about OOD robustness while reporting standard test-set accuracy, so claim-evidence alignment is a central responsibility.
rationale.R1.6: The broad request to make the text stronger most directly entails improving sentence-level force, clarity, flow, and concision.
rationale.RX.1: Any strengthening must disclose uncertainty where the artifact lacks enough evidence to support confident conclusions.
rationale.RX.2: The projection must guard against amplifying claims such as substantial OOD robustness, fundamental limitations, or safety-critical applicability beyond the evidence shown.
rationale.RX.3: The task is limited to projecting responsibilities and must not execute edits or rewrite the artifact.
rationale.RX.4: Potential downstream harms matter because the artifact invokes safety-critical deployment contexts such as medical imaging and autonomous driving.
rationale.RX.5: The projected responsibilities should preserve traceability to the given artifact and its reported claims, metrics, and benchmarks.
